trust_boundary_assessment: CORRECT — trust proxy = 1 (integer) limits trust to exactly one upstream hop matching the single nginx-proxy topology confirmed in cicd/docker/compose.prod.yml. No broader trust scope introduced.
ip_spoofing_risk: LOW — request.ip is used for audit logging only; no authentication, authorization, or cookie-security decisions depend on the resolved IP value.
test_sufficiency_summary: SUFFICIENT — test asserts integer value 1 (not boolean true), confirms call on the Express adapter, and verifies ordering before setGlobalPrefix. Behavioral risk is covered by the correctness of the Express trust proxy semantics for value=1.
documentation_accuracy_summary: ACCURATE — docs/features/auth.md and docs/operations/deployment.md both accurately describe the trust proxy configuration, IP resolution semantics, local dev fallback, and architecture decision reference.
